titles.title: Meitantei Conan: Pyramid kara no Chousenjou!
名探偵コナン ピラミッドからの挑戦状!
Detective Conan: A Written Challenge from the Pyramids!

data.title: Meitantei Conan: Pyramid kara no Chousenjou!
data.title_english: Detective Conan: A Written Challenge from the Pyramids!
data.title_japanese: 名探偵コナン ピラミッドからの挑戦状!
data.synopsis: The Detective Boys receive a letter by airmail when they visit the Moore Detective Agency. The letter was posted in Egypt, and the sender calls themselves Cleopatra. According to the contents, a 4500-year-old pharaoh's curse is in danger of being reawakened. To prevent this, the seven riddles described in the letter must be solved within a short time, all of which relate to pyramids. While Moore is already drunk in the afternoon and of no great help, Ran agrees to assist the children. The Detective Boys then set out to answer the seven questions posed in the letter...
data.background: This anime was included for a limited time as a VHS tape with a non-fiction book for children on world heritage sites published by Shogakukan in Japan. Beyond that, there are no other known releases in Japan or abroad.

Onnanoko wa Osatou to Spice to Suteki na Nanika de Dekiteiru
data.synopsis:
After accepting a weekend invitation, Hachiman Hikigaya accompanies Isshiki Iroha around the Chiba Prefecture to brainstorm ideas suitable for an ideal date with Hayato Hayama. As the duo wanders from place to place without a plan, they seemingly enjoy each other's company. Yet, through these straightforward and sincere interactions, the meaning behind what it means to be genuine continues to intrigue Hachiman and his outlook for the future of the Volunteer Service Club and its members.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Mashou no Nie 3
魔将の贄3

data.title: Mashou no Nie 3
data.title_japanese: 魔将の贄3
data.synopsis:
Long ago, the infamous pirate Van Clad ruled the seas unchallenged—that is, until his cunning navigator orchestrated a mutiny and slayed him during a treasure expedition. However, before drawing his last breath, he swore to one day return and claim his vengeance upon the descendants of his betrayers. 

Three hundred years later, the young naval officer Klaus Ainhart stumbles upon Van Clad's final resting place. While exploring the deceased pirate's remains, Klaus is suddenly possessed by Van Clad's malevolent spirit. Now in possession of the officer's memories, the newly reborn pirate learns that his host is actually a celebrated military figure from the Kingdom of Austria, founded by none other than the traitorous navigator who killed him centuries ago.

Under the guise of Klaus, Van Clad carries out a sinister plan to defile the legacy of the man he hates the  most—by enslaving the women of Austria and turning the kingdom into a pirate lair.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Based on the erotic game developed by Liquid in 2015.

titles.title: Battle Girl High School
Battle Girl Project
バトルガール ハイスクール
Battle Girl High School

data.title: Battle Girl High School
data.title_japanese: バトルガール ハイスクール
data.synopsis:
Based on COLOPL's school action role-playing game. Set in the year 2045. The world has been contaminated by Irousu (mysterious invaders who suddenly appeared), and humans find themselves restricted and contained. Standing boldly against these invaders are ordinary girls everywhere, without a powerful army or even weapons.

The Shinjugamine Girls Academy is a school for these "Hoshimori" (Star Guardians) destined to fight the Irousu. The player is assigned to this academy to train the girls and take back the contaminated Earth. And so, once again, the chimes echo through the sun-strewn schoolyard to mark the beginning of classes today...

(Source: ANN, edited)

titles.title: Peace Maker Kurogane Movie 1: Omou Michi
PEACE MAKER 鐵 前編～想道〈オモウミチ〉～
PEACE MAKER KUROGANE – Belief & Friend
Peace Maker Kurogane der Film: Belief & Friend
Peace Maker Kurogane la Película: Belief & Friend
Peace Maker Kurogane le Film: Belief & Friend

data.title: Peace Maker Kurogane Movie 1: Omou Michi
data.title_japanese: PEACE MAKER 鐵 前編～想道〈オモウミチ〉～
data.synopsis: Although traumatized by witnessing the murder of his parents by one of the Choushuu, Ichimura Tetsunosuke's thirst for revenge leads him to desire strength. At the age of 15, Tetsunosuke approached the Shinsengumi, wanting to become one of its members. However, Tetsunosuke lacked the skill, mind, and will to emotionlessly cut down whoever threatened peace and the Shinsengumi. Even with the support of his brother Tatsunosuke and his newfound friends of the Shinsengumi, little did Tetsunosuke know the blood and pain he would have to face being part of this historical group.

titles.title: Katsudou Shashin
Matsumoto Fragment
活動写真

data.title: Katsudou Shashin
data.title_japanese: 活動写真
data.synopsis:
A young boy dressed in sailor attire and a bright red cap is shown to write the Japanese kanji characters translating to the phrase "moving picture." As he completes writing the phrase, he faces toward the viewer and bows.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Katsudou Shashin consists of fifty frames of celluloid strip in its three-second duration, with sixteen frames per second. Discovered in 2004, having been purchased with a private collection in Kyoto, it is suspected to have been created between 1905 and 1911. This would make it one of the oldest pieces of animation from Japan.

titles.title: Planetarian: Hoshi no Hito
planetarian～星の人～
Planetarian: Storyteller of the Stars

data.title: Planetarian: Hoshi no Hito
data.title_japanese: planetarian～星の人～
data.synopsis:
An adaptation of the visual-novel by Key, Planetarian: Hoshi no Hito combines the story of the original work with an expansion that extends the narrative with content from the Hoshi no Hito light-novel sequel. 

In the future after much of the world has been devastated by nuclear and biological warfare, a young scavenger or "Junker" exploring a quarantined and abandoned city comes across a service robot still faithfully awaiting customers in the rooftop planetarium of a department store. Against his pragmatic instincts he helps the robot repair the planetarium's projector: a decision which will change both their fates.

(Source: ANN)
